raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> we were given a ride from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX to our hotel XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX a {$17.00} fare. I attempted to pay with my credit card. The card reader repeatedly displayed an error message and did not appear to process the payment. Thinking that it was my card. We then tried my wifes card from a different credit card company. Her card was declined by the same machine with the same error message. Because the merchant system was not excepting any electronic payments I paid the driver in cash, including a tip. 
Despite this both my card and my wifes card were later charged {$1000.00} each for the same failed transaction. 
I noticed this on the Barclays website a day later that I was charged this amount. I immediately filed fraud for the scam on their website. I also contacted the merchant. The merchant emailed me a sale refund for XXXX XXXX XXXX  and that I should see this on my account which I did. At that time I believed everything was taken care of. The merchant and I corresponded through XXXX. 
We continued our travels to different remote areas in XXXX. We arrived home XX/XX/XXXX. I received a letter in the mail from Barclays when we got home dated XX/XX/year>. Stating We attempted to contact you on XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year> to obtain additional information to support your claim. Since we have not received a response, we have close our investigation. The transaction was placed into dispute status. Not sure how they tried to contact me. 
I wrote several letters explaining my dispute which they allowed me to reopen, the last one was XX/XX/year>. I asked for a detailed written explanation of the basis for their decision to deny and copies of any evidence or records provided by the merchant that you use to reach your decision. The last letter I received from them was XX/XX/year> XXXX days before my last dispute letter. They never got back to me after XX/XX/XXXX. Ive also called them and was told that a supervisor would call me within XXXX hours. Im still waiting.
